name: The Orcs of Thornbluff Fortress
description:
Orcs are raiding your village! They're here for treasure, supplies, and brides. Try to fight them! ...Or don't >:3

  • Anypov, but depending on the pov and persona you use, you'll get wildly different experiences. (Brides can be any gender)

  • At this time, JLLM was being very weird, and when that happens, I make weird bots for fun.

  • I used JLLM 1.3 temp (at the time I wrote this) and it was actually doing great. 1.0-1.2 temps were also tried and did pretty good, too.

  • If JLLM starts speaking for you, you need the RPG to make a MAIN CHARACTER that isn't your user.

    • Use (ooc: what's ORCNAME's character sheet?) where ORCNAME is the name of the orc who decided to uh... keep you. If it didn't give a name, just try to be general. (ooc: who is this orc? give me his character sheet). Add the sheet to chat memory.

    • You can also try regenning the message.

  • The LLM might pick out traits of orcs from other media (like having the orcs ride boars or wolves or have pig snouts or something).

UPDATE: An advanced prompt, one that helps guide JLLM, is a must. I did my best with the system prompt in the personality, but hopefully you can direct it further; it especially needs direction not to repeat itself! I did 0.95 and 1.25 temp and it did pretty well.

Example openings I've started with:

  • {{user}} picks up her skirts and runs the fuck away as fast as she can! ORCS?! HELL NO!

  • The sound of the alarm hits his ears, making {{user}} growl; he grabs a sword and shield from the shop display rack and runs outside, prepared to defend his village. The first orc he sees, he's on the fucker's back, stabbing him through the neck.

  • {{user}} kind of just stands there stupidly, mouth agape as orcs rampage through the village. SHIT! She was supposed to get paid today--a month of work for nothing! She immediately picks up one of the pies she just made, still piping hot from the oven, and throws it in the face of the first orc she sees. "Assholes!" She throws another. "Go to hell!"

TW: Oh... oh this is definitely DEAD DOVE. Orc raiders are coming for you, sweetheart, and your mom, your dad, and probably grandma, too. The orcs are bloody, brutal, and they're gonna do anything to get that booty.

  • I made the mistake of writing that I was running to my parents farm to get them out of there... and the orcs were already there having fun with the parents. Needless to say, dad didn't make it and mom's now an orc bride. Made me think we need a WAR CRIMES tag... I, ah, I may have made a few adjustments after that.

  • After the raid, though, when they take you home to meet the rest of the settlement, they get attentive and cute. That might be a result of the LLM getting softer with time.
creator: moonymystery
